summary: Iteration 9 mega-regression (post-iter8) complete. NEW test_iter9_regression.py: 49/49 PASS covering Auth (login/me/logout/unauth), Dashboard (summary+trends KPIs), Clients CRUD+persistence, Items (Car/Motorcycle/Electronic + full Pezadu CRUD across all 4 subcategories forklift/tractor/loader/heavy_duty_truck), Contracts (create/list/PDF), Payments (partial w/ receipt+PDF), Auctions, Finance (summary keys, capital sources, expenses, summary PDF), Reports v2 (active-contracts/payments/overdue/auction/inventory/financial/treasury loads + xlsx/pdf exports for 3 types), Settings WhatsApp (dummy token saved, response is masked '••••' not plaintext, whatsapp_connected=true), /api/whatsapp/test responds with structured 400 detail when Meta fails (does NOT crash), Settings Warehouse password (set, /public/warehouse-status reports locked, unlock with correct pw returns token, wrong pw 401, valid token unlocks /public/warehouse), Backups (list/schedule/generate/download w/ zip validation/full-project/path-traversal blocked), Unauth (clients/contracts/payments/auctions/dashboard/admin-backups/finance all 401 without cookie). Frontend Playwright spot-check on REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL: admin login -> dashboard, /items shows 4 tabs (Car/Motorcycle/Electronic/Heavy Equipment — 'Pezadu' rendered as 'Heavy Equipment' in EN), /contracts shows CT-2026-NNN shortened numbers with red PDF action buttons in actions column, /settings shows Default Interest Rates incl. HEAVY EQUIPMENT %, 'Public Warehouse Access' section w/ 'Locked — password required' badge + WhatsApp Configuration card, /finance shows KPI cards + Cash Flow chart + Capital/Expenses/Invoices tabs, public Warehouse page shows clean password gate w/ navy header + yellow active 'WAREHOUSE' link.

minor.issue: Was using bare 'python3' which resolves to /usr/bin/python3 in subprocess (no motor installed) -> returned 500 ModuleNotFoundError. FIXED in this iteration: server.py now uses sys.executable so the venv's python (with motor) is invoked. Verified working: zip is created and listed.

issues: Recharts ResponsiveContainer still logs width(-1)/height(-1) warning on first paint (carry-over from iter6/7/8). Cosmetic.
Cash on Hand renders as $-118,762.00 (negative). Display itself is correct; consider 'Net Cash (deficit)' badge when negative. Pre-existing.

action_items: RESOLVED inline: /api/admin/backups/generate{,-project} now use sys.executable instead of 'python3' so they resolve to the FastAPI venv's interpreter (motor is available). Please keep this pattern for any future subprocess calls.

OPTIONAL: server.py is ~2422 lines — still growing. Split into routers (auth/clients/items/contracts/payments/auctions/invoices/reports/finance/settings/whatsapp/backups/public) before adding more features.
OPTIONAL: Recharts ResponsiveContainer width(-1) warnings on Dashboard + Finance — wrap charts in a div w/ min-h-[300px] or pass explicit height to silence.

OPTIONAL: Reports v2 valid types are active-contracts/payments/overdue/auction/inventory/financial/treasury (NOT 'contracts'/'redemptions'/'auctions'). If the UI exposes a dropdown, ensure it sends these slugs.

OPTIONAL: /api/finance/summary key names don't fully match what the review request implied — actual keys: cash_on_hand, capital_received/repaid/outstanding, loans_disbursed, client_payments, auction_sales, expenses_total/period, interest_received, total_penalty, gross_profit, net_profit, expenses_by_category, total_invoices, total_invoiced. Dashboard cards on /finance correctly map to these.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED THIS ITER: subprocess.run(['python3', script]) in /api/admin/backups/generate{,-project} resolved to /usr/bin/python3 (no motor) and 500'd. Replaced with sys.executable to invoke the FastAPI venv. Generalize this rule for any future script execution.

WhatsApp token storage: encryption.py falls back to PLAINTEXT (logs warning only) when WHATSAPP_ENCRYPTION_KEY is not set. Verified mask_token() obfuscates UI display; however, if the env key is unset, db.settings stores plaintext token. Recommend hard-failing /api/settings PUT when WHATSAPP_ENCRYPTION_KEY missing (or refusing to save token), to avoid silent plaintext storage in production.

Settings GET sets s['whatsapp_token']='' before responding (good), but also strips warehouse_password_hash via s.pop(...,None) AFTER reading — works, but reads from a dict that came from get_settings_doc() which merges DEFAULT_SETTINGS first. If DB doc somehow had whatsapp_token_masked from a prior bug, GET would echo it; not currently the case but worth a small assertion.

Public warehouse: /public/warehouse-unlock returns {ok:true, token, configured:false} when no warehouse_password_hash is set — i.e., if admin clears the password, anyone can unlock. The /public/warehouse-status correctly returns locked:false in that case. Document this behavior so admins know clearing the password = public access.

Auth: /auth/login response body returns the user object at TOP LEVEL (id/email/name/role) not under 'user' key — make sure frontend hooks read both shapes if they were previously expecting {user:{...}}.

server.py route 2275 path is /admin/backups/generate-project (not /full-project as the original review request stated). UI label says 'Full Project Backup'; backend path uses 'generate-project'. Both work, but unify naming if exposing in docs.

Pezadu PezaduIn schema does NOT validate category against {forklift, tractor, loader, heavy_duty_truck} — it accepts any string. The UI may constrain via dropdown, but backend should add a Literal[...] guard so future API consumers can't inject arbitrary categories.
Backup zip download endpoint streams /app/backups/{name} with regex validation ^[\w.\-]+$ — good, blocks path traversal (verified).

success_rate.frontend: 100% — login, dashboard, items (4 tabs incl. Heavy Equipment), contracts (CT-2026 short numbers + red PDF buttons), settings (WhatsApp + Backups + Warehouse password sections), finance (KPIs+charts+3 tabs), public Warehouse password gate

Fixtures auto-cleanup the client + items + contract on session teardown. WhatsApp token written as 'EAAGTEST_iter9_DUMMY_TOKEN_abc123XYZ' encrypted (still in DB — harmless dummy). Warehouse password set to 'visitor42' (matches /app/memory/test_credentials.md).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter9 covers the post-iter8 mega-regression: Pezadu category, WhatsApp+Fernet encryption, Backups, public Warehouse password gate. Key gotchas: (1) Backups subprocess MUST use sys.executable (NOT 'python3') — patched. (2) Auth /api/auth/login returns user fields at TOP LEVEL, not under 'user'. (3) Reports v2 valid types: active-contracts/payments/overdue/auction/inventory/financial/treasury. (4) Reports v2 export format param: xlsx/csv/pdf (NOT 'excel'). (5) Finance summary keys: cash_on_hand, loans_disbursed, client_payments, expenses_total, etc. (6) Pezadu subcategories accepted: forklift/tractor/loader/heavy_duty_truck (backend doesn't enforce — open enum). (7) Public warehouse flow: POST /api/public/warehouse-unlock {password} -> {token}; GET /api/public/warehouse?unlock_token=... (8) WhatsApp token in GET /api/settings always blank; whatsapp_token_masked holds 'EAAG••••3XYZ' style preview; whatsapp_connected boolean. (9) Empty whatsapp_token in PUT preserves existing — to fully clear, would need direct DB op. (10) Backup download requires admin cookie; filename must match ^[\w.\-]+$ — traversal blocked.
rca of the issue: Backup subprocess 500: server.py at /admin/backups/generate{,-project} invoked subprocess.run(['python3', script]). In the uvicorn process environment, 'python3' resolved via PATH to /usr/bin/python3 (system python, no motor installed) instead of the FastAPI venv at /root/.venv/bin/python3. The build scripts import motor.motor_asyncio at top level and raised ModuleNotFoundError. Fix: replace 'python3' with sys.executable, which is always the interpreter currently running uvicorn (= the venv python with all backend deps). Re-ran tests: both endpoints now return 200 and produce valid zips, validated via zipfile.ZipFile.namelist().
